title: Floor 1: The Silent Gate
intro: The gates are rusted shut. You hear a Hollow Captain patrolling the dark.
objective: Find the Gate Key held by the Hollow Captain.

story_start.title: Echoes of Aethelgard
story_start.text: The kingdom is trapped in a loop. You are an Echo Walker, sworn to ascend the Spire and break the curse. The Outskirts lie ahead.

events.unlockMessage: The Gate Key turns with a groan.

actions.introText: The Captain raises his rusted sword. 'None may leave the city...'
actions.outroText: He crumbles to dust, dropping a heavy iron key.

actions.text: The wind carries the scent of ash.

title: Floor 2: Crumbling Market
intro: Stalls still hold rotted fruit. The inner gate requires a Merchant Pass.
objective: Purchase a Merchant Pass from the Shop.

events.unlockMessage: You show the pass to the silent gatekeeper mechanism.

title: Floor 3: Cathedral of Dust
intro: Prayers hang frozen in the cold air. A massive shape blocks the nave.

events.unlockMessage: The gargoyle's key unlocks the heavy sanctum doors.

actions.introText: The stone eyes snap open. A deep bell tolls from within its chest.
actions.outroText: The gargoyle cracks and falls silent. A key lies in the rubble.

title: Floor 4: Hall of Mirrors
intro: The Gilded Halls. One mirror reflects a path forward.

story_start.title: The Gilded Halls
story_start.text: You have breached the castle. The air smells of perfume and rot. The walls are lined with mirrors that seem to watch you.

events.unlockMessage: The shard fits into the reflective barrier.

actions.text: You gaze into the shards. One piece reflects a door that isn't there.
You see yourself die in a reflection.

title: Floor 5: The Royal Banquet
intro: A feast laid for ghosts. You need an invitation.

actions.text: You hear laughter... or is it screaming?

title: Floor 6: The Throne Room
intro: She sits upon the throne, weeping for a child never born.

events.unlockMessage: The Queen's seal opens the path to the Spire.

actions.introText: She looks up, eyes streaming with black tears. 'My child... where is my child?'
actions.outroText: Her weeping ceases. 'Thank you...' she whispers, fading away.

title: Floor 7: The Gearworks
intro: The elevator is broken. Find a replacement cog.
objective: Hunt Clockwork Sentinels for a Cog.

story_start.title: The Spire
story_start.text: The laws of physics break down here. You are climbing the inner mechanism of the curse itself.

events.unlockMessage: You repair the mechanism. The platform rises.

title: Floor 8: Fractured Observatory
intro: The stars are a lock. Find the Starmap to solve it.

events.unlockMessage: You align the telescope. The door opens.

actions.text: The constellations move when you blink.

title: Floor 9: Precipice of Seconds
intro: One step from eternity. Malacor awaits.

events.unlockMessage: The Void Key dissolves the barrier to the final moment.

actions.introText: Malacor floats above the precipice. 'You persist? Then suffer eternity.'
actions.outroText: The Chrono-Lich screams as time catches up to him.

actions.text: Time flows backwards here. Dust rises from the floor.
